subcodes.title: Words to Edward Getsinger, spoken on 1913-11-10
subcodes.first_line: Greater love has no man for another than I have demonstrated toward thee. I have sent for thee and am sending both of you to India
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @disregarding bodily comfort, @personal instructions, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God
